ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Business sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "axis_note" INTEGER /* Axis note value */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0 = Monday, 1 = Tuesday, ..., 6 = Sunday) */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns value */,
  "binary_finance" INTEGER /* Binary finance value */,
  "norm_finance" REAL /* Normalized finance value */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Stock split coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Specific model or algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy or confidence level of the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data feed */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Time of the data feed */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data feed (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., real-time, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
